textPlain: How do you try it out in the web browser? There's no obvious link on the website
That name makes me slightly upset and afeared. The game looks nice, though.
And what other platform should I add? The application is available in RuStore https://www.rustore.ru/catalog/app/com.khlebobul.pegma

At the meantime (not mobile friendly): https://www.chiark.greenend.org.uk/~sgtatham/puzzles/js/pegs...It is part of Simon Tatham's puzzle collection, it also has an app on F-Droid:https://f-droid.org/en/packages/name.boyle.chris.sgtpuzzles/And the sgt-puzzles package on Debian/Ubuntu, possibly other distros package it too.
I haven't published the web version of the app yet, maybe I will in the future
